preamble: The palatal glide can undergo fortition, strengthening into a voiced palato-alveolar fricative.

examples.note: Latin /j/ word-initially became [dʒ] and then simplified to [ʒ] in French.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
Alkire, T., & Rosen, C. (2010). Romance Philology.
